title: Auto generate ID column not working via Forms
excerpt: Hello, I have a form to capture items in a board. There is an auto generate column ID that was perfectly working. But out of a sudden new items are not creating IDs anymore. I don’t know what is the issue!

posts.author: rudimartins (Rudi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I have a form to capture items in a board. There is an auto generate column ID that was perfectly working. But out of a sudden new items are not creating IDs anymore. I don’t know what is the issue!
